subcodes.first_line: The springtime of divine bounty hath come, and therein waft the breezes of the mercy of the All-Merciful. Blessed is he who hath turned himself thereunto and found that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی ربیع الفضل و تمر فیه اریاح رحمه الرحمن طوبی لمن اقبل الیها و وجد ما
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action
